title: Statistical methods for handling unwanted variation in metabolomics data.
author: De Livera AM Sysi-Aho M Jacob L Gagnon-Bartsch JA Castillo S Simpson JA Speed TP
content: S-EPMC4544854 PMC4544854 Statistical methods for handling unwanted variation in metabolomics data. Metabolomics experiments are inevitably subject to a component of unwanted variation, due to factors such as batch effects, long runs of samples, and confounding biological variation. Although
